sb_prompt: DISCUSS CRIME IN AMERICAN CITIES TODAY.  WHAT ARE YOUR CONCERNS AND THE CONCERNS OF THE OTHER CALLER?  WHAT STEPS CAN BE TAKEN TO REDUCE CRIME?
raw_output:
Participants: ParticiapntA, ParticipatnB
Topic: Discussing crime in American cities today
ParticiptantA [PA]: Hey there! What's going on?
ParticiaptnB [PB]: Not much, just got off work. How was your day?
PA: It was alright, pretty uneventful. So, what brought you to call tonight?
PB: Just wanted to discuss something that's been on my mind lately - crime in our city. Have you noticed anything unusual happening around where you live?
 PA : Yeah, it seems like every time I hear news, it's always about someone getting robbed or attacked. Even at the park near my house, they had a shooting recently.
 PB: Same here. There have been break-ins at several stores nearby too. Makes me wonder how safe it really is for us living here.
 PA: Definitely. Do you think it could be due to lack of police presence, or maybe even poor economy causing more desperation among people?
 P B : Could be a combination of factors. Economy isn't great right now, but we also have limited resources for law enforcement. Hard to keep up with everything that goes on.
PA : That makes sense. Any ideas on how we might reduce crime rates in our area?
